reviews.review_description: i was looking for a racing game something to help feel the adrenaline of when you are actually in the state of a race car and out of nowhere i find this and i go ahead and install it thinking that's what i'm looking for only to find out all it is is an app to watch live races in the vr seat now that wouldn't be so bad if it wasn't tagged as a game yes that is something i have noticed it is running through tags like it's a game but realistically all it is is a social media like app now don't get me wrong it's good and all but it's not a game it is running through that false advertisement trying to tell you that it's a game when there are no achievements no game play whatsover it's just watching videos  if you enjoy watching racing then go for it but if you're looking to actually play your racing game i would just ignore this and move on

I think most people’s disdain comes from not understanding what the app is about. Personally, I’m super happy someone is taking the concept of watching races in VR and finally bringing it into the real world! I love experimental, autonomous driving and I’m so excited to see where it goes- and what a fitting racing series to be testing such a high-tech viewing experience in too! I can’t wait to see where this goes.
Seems like it would be a very cool ride with me VR app and then it’s nothing more than a weird science project broadcast.

Don't install this app as its not a game

reviews.review_description:
I download it because it was free... And after 30 seconds I erase it from my Quest.... Good think I did not pay for this think....

reviews.review_title: Neat concept! Needs work on quest 3.
reviews.review_description: The track map projection onto the floor is fantastic! However, the race countdown was a couple of hours off, and the get in car button on the track projection would not work for me. I took videos of my issues for review but need to figure out where to submit them.
They want you to think it's a racing game, but no. Do not install!

reviews.review_title: Not a game, but a glimpse of something.
reviews.review_description:
Okay, first of all this is misclassified as a game. It is, at best, an experience. The immersive part is basically identical to watching a YouTube VR video.
It did raise some interesting possibilities. Feeling like you're sitting on board a racing car going round an F1 track is great, especially when they (eventually) start to pick up towards a racing speed. It made me want live VR coverage of a real F1 race where you can hop between cars at will.
The "racing" itself... well, no spoilers, but let's just say that Messrs Verstappen, Norris et al don't need to fear for their jobs just yet. Though as a former programmer myself, I was entertained.
In some ways, though, the biggest disappointment was to get to the end of the only "real" event and hear that they hope there might be another one in a year or so. If you're going to call it a "racing league", you need competition - multiple times. The teams need to go away and do a bit of rapid development to fix the obvious bugs, then come back in maybe a month. 99% of users will uninstall this given what is there, and the prospect of no new content until mid-2025.
